facts.claim: Costa Favolosa is a cruise ship operated by Italian cruise line Costa Crociere, ordered in October 2007.
Based on the Concordia-class design, Costa Favolosa was laid down by Fincantieri's Marghera shipyard on 5 November 2009 and launched on 6 August 2010.
Part of a five-ship expansion of the Costa Crociere fleet, the vessel entered service in July 2011.
